memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr, bool bInCacheEvent=true, bool bInRetryOnFailed=false)
memberdef.name: GameTelemetry

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform, bool bInCacheEvent=true, bool bInRetryOnFailed=false)
memberdef.name: GameTelemetry

briefdescription.para: Set the interval of sending telemetry event to the backend. By default it sends the queued events once a minute. Should not be less than 5 seconds.
Set list of event that need to be backed up on disc before sending in order to be able to recover in case of failure.
Set list of event that need to be sent immediately without the needs to jobQueue it.
Send/enqueue a single authorized telemetry data. Server should be logged in. See DedicatedServer::LoginWithClientCredentials().

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

briefdescription.para: Check the cache has been updated or not.
Set a flag to cache events.
Check the flag value to cache events.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< TelemetryBodyPtr > const &Events, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SendProtectedEvents

briefdescription.para: Send telemetry data securely and the user should be logged in first.
